subcodes.first_line: The Riḍván hath come, and the All-Merciful is in manifest sorrow. We directed Our steps unto the garden while the banners of grief passed by [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الرضوان و الرحمن فی حزن مبین توجهنا الی البستان و رایات الاحزان تمر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment
